summary: Phase 4 Part 1 Email Verification System - All 11 tests PASSED. Backend endpoints (send-verification, verify-email, /me with emailVerified field) and frontend components (EmailVerificationBanner, VerifyEmail page) all working correctly.

issues: Success state shows briefly before React StrictMode re-renders and shows error (token consumed). This is expected behavior but may confuse users who see both states.

passed_tests: 1. Backend: POST /api/auth/send-verification - returns success (200) with 'Verification email sent'
2. Backend: POST /api/auth/send-verification rate limit (60s) - returns 429 'Please wait before requesting another verification email'
3. Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token with invalid token - returns 404 'Invalid or expired verification token'
4. Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token with valid token - returns 200 'Email verified successfully', sets emailVerified=true, clears token
5. Backend: GET /api/auth/me - includes emailVerified boolean field
6. Backend: POST /api/auth/send-verification when already verified - returns 400 'Email already verified'
7. Frontend: EmailVerificationBanner shows on Dashboard for unverified user (data-testid='email-verification-banner')
8. Frontend: Resend button exists and works (data-testid='resend-verification-btn') - shows 'Sent!' after click
9. Frontend: Dismiss button exists and works (data-testid='dismiss-verification-btn') - banner hides after click
10. Frontend: /verify-email/invalid-token shows error state (data-testid='verify-error') with 'Go to Dashboard' button
11. Frontend: /verify-email/:validToken shows success state (data-testid='verify-success') with 'Email Verified!' message
critical_code_review_comments: Email verification system properly implemented with all required features
Rate limiting on resend (60s) working correctly
Token is single-use and properly invalidated after verification
EmailVerificationBanner properly checks user.emailVerified and localStorage dismissal state
VerifyEmail page handles loading, success, and error states with appropriate data-testids
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Part 1 Email Verification fully tested. Test user reset to emailVerified=false for future testing. To test verification flow: 1) Login, 2) Call POST /api/auth/send-verification, 3) Get token from DB, 4) Call GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token. The verification success state displays briefly before redirect to dashboard.

EmailVerificationBanner.shows_for: users with emailVerified=false and not dismissed

states.success: Shows 'Email Verified!' with data-testid='verify-success', redirects to dashboard
states.error: Shows 'Verification Failed' with data-testid='verify-error' and 'Go to Dashboard' button
